title: W.H.O. Chief Is ‘Deeply Concerned’ by Speed and Scale of Ebola Outbreak
summary_full: Health officials reported more than 130 suspected deaths and 513 cases, a sharp rise since the outbreak was first identified in the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda.
summary_public: Health officials reported more than 130 suspected deaths and 513 cases, a sharp rise since the outbreak was first identified in the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda.
